zh.lifeSummary: Alice de Basset於大約1130年出生在英國薩默塞特謝普頓 蒙塔古。她和Richard Montagu至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於大約1230年在她的家鄉享年102歲，埋葬在英國斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Alice de Basset于大约1130年出生在英国薩默塞特謝普頓 蒙塔古。她和Richard Montagu至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于大约1230年在她的家乡享年102岁，埋葬在英国斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特。

nameMeanings.name: Basset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mauricio, Abelardo, Florencio, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Soledad, Vicente.  Eastern Slavic Dmytro, Liya, Pyotr, Sergey.
Catalan: habitational name from a place so named in the district of La Garrotxa, Catalonia.
Basque: topographic name for someone who lived by a wood, from baso ‘wood, forest’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: Alice de Basset was born about 1130, in Shepton Montague, Somerset, England. She had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Richard Montagu. She died about 1230, in her hometown, at the age of 102, and was buried in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Alice de Basset est née environ 1130, à Shepton Montague, Somerset, Angleterre. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Richard Montagu. Elle est décédée environ 1230, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 102 ans, et a été enterrée à Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Alice de Basset wurde um 1130 in Shepton Montague, Somerset, England geboren. Sie hatte mit Richard Montagu mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb um 1230 im Alter von 102 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Alice de Basset è nata il circa 1130 nel Shepton Montague, Somerset, England. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Richard Montagu. Morì circa 1230, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 102 anni, e fu sepolta a Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Bassetは約1130年にイギリスソメルセトシェプトン モンタグーで生まれた。彼女はRichard Montaguとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1230年に故郷で102歳で死去し，イギリススタフォードシュアイアドレイトン バセットにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Basset(은)는 대략 1130년 영국 서머세트 셰프턴 몽아구에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Richard Montagu(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1230년 그녀의 고향에서 102세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스태퍼드실르 드라이턴 배싯에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Alice de Basset nasceu aproximadamente 1130, em Shepton Montague, Somerset, Inglaterra. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas com Richard Montagu. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1230, em sua cidade natal, com 102 anos, e foi sepultada em Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Alice de Basset родилась около 1130 г. в местности шептон монтагу, сомирсет, Англия. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Richard Montagu. Она умерла около 1230 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 102 лет и была похоронена в местности дреитон бассетт, стаффордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Alice de Basset nació aproximadamente 1130, en Shepton Montague, Somerset, Inglaterra. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas con Richard Montagu. Murió aproximadamente 1230, en su pueblo, a la edad de 102 años, y fue sepultada en Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.
